html:
Exclusive to:

“Am I really this desperate for food?”

–Maxwell

Bug is a Food Value added in the Hamlet DLC. There are currently only 2 items in this category: Bean Bugs and Gummy Slugs. Both of these items can only be obtained by flipping Stone Slabs. after 8 in-game days the Stone Slabs will regenerate their loot, making these items renewable

Each of these items has one Crock Pot recipe associated with it, however, they both require numerical amounts of one of the specific items, not a decimal amount of bugs. Due to this, the category is never used for determining the produced crockpot dish.

Raw Cooked Bug Value Crock Pot
Bean Bugs Cooked Bean Bugs 1 Yes
Gummy Slug Cooked Gummy Slug 1 Yes

Crock Pot Meals That Use Bugs

Food Name Recipe
Requirements** Filler
Restrictions
Feijoada +20 +75 +15 6 5 -2 ×3 ×0.5
Gummy Cake -3 +150 -5 20 40 1 ×1 ×1 No
  • All Food Value] are shown with decimal points.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Lỗi là Giá trị Thực phẩm được thêm vào trong Hamlet DLC. Hiện tại chỉ có 2 vật phẩm trong danh mục này là Bọ Đậu và Sên Dẻo. Cả hai vật phẩm này chỉ có thể có được bằng cách lật Stone Slabs. sau 8 ngày trong trò chơi, Stone Slabs sẽ tái tạo lại chiến lợi phẩm của mình, khiến những vật phẩm này có thể tái tạo được
title: Bug
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} {{Quote|Am I really this desperate for food?|Maxwell}} '''Bug''' is a [[Food Value]] added in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. There are currently only 2 items in this category: [[Bean Bugs]] and [[Gummy Slug]]s. Both of these items can only be obtained by flipping [[Stone Slab]]s. after 8 in-game days the [[Stone Slab]]s will regenerate their loot, making these items renewable Each of these items has one [[Crock Pot]] recipe associated with it, however, they both require numerical amounts of one of the specific items, not a decimal amount of bugs. Due to this, the category is never used for determining the produced crockpot dish. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! scope="col" colspan="2" |Raw ! scope="col" colspan="2" |Cooked ! scope="col" |Bug Value ! scope="col" |Crock Pot |- |[[File:Bean Bugs.png|48px|link=Bean Bugs]]||[[Bean Bugs]]||[[File:Cooked Bean Bugs.png|48px|link=Cooked Bean Bugs]]||[[Cooked Bean Bugs]]||1||Yes |- |[[File:Gummy Slug.png|48px|link=Gummy Slug]]||[[Gummy Slug]]||[[File:Cooked Gummy Slug.png|48px|link=Cooked Gummy Slug]]||[[Cooked Gummy Slug]]||1||Yes |- |} ==Crock Pot Meals That Use Bugs== {| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center; width:100%" |- ! rowspan="2" scope="col" | Food ! rowspan="2" scope="col" | Name ! rowspan="2" scope="col" | [[File:Health Meter.png|28px|Health]] ! rowspan="2" scope="col" | [[File:Hunger Meter.png|28px|Hunger]] ! rowspan="2" scope="col" | [[File:Sanity Meter.png|28px|Sanity]] ! rowspan="2" scope="col" | [[File:Rot.png|28px|Perish time (days)]] ! rowspan="2" scope="col" | [[File:Crock Pot.png|28px|Cook time (sec)]] ! rowspan="2" scope="col" | [[File:Priority.png|24px|Priority]] ! colspan="2" | Recipe |- !Requirements** !Filler
